error.signature: Execution failed for task ':app:processDebugMainManifest'. Manifest merger failed : Attribute application@appComponentFactory

verdict.summary: AndroidManifest.xml merge conflict between app and library manifests. Conflicting attributes, SDK versions, or duplicate permissions.

dead_ends.action: Delete the app's AndroidManifest.xml and let it regenerate
dead_ends.why_fails: The app manifest is the source of truth. Deleting it removes your custom config (permissions, activities, intent filters).

dead_ends.action: Add tools:replace to every conflicting attribute one by one
dead_ends.why_fails: Blindly overriding library attributes can break their functionality. Understand what each library needs.

workarounds.action: Use tools:replace on specific conflicting attributes

workarounds.how: Check error for required min SDK; update android { defaultConfig { minSdk = 24 } }  // match library requirement

workarounds.action: Use the manifest merger report to find exact conflicts
